sourceEvidence.extraction: pdftotext page-level exact card-name mentions; candidate mapping only, not final FAQ adjudication

snapshotEntries.cardNo: exact official collector number; do not normalize variants away
snapshotEntries.baseCollectorNo: analysis-only normalized collector family; never a primary key
snapshotEntries.functionalUnitId: FU-{sha1(functional signature)[0..10]} matching the repository functional-unit strategy
snapshotEntries.uncoveredEffectCategories: heuristic risk tags for later audit; not an implementation claim

functionalUnits.representativeCardNo: stable representative chosen by sorted cardNo inside the functional unit
functionalUnits.implementation: current read-only mapping to CardBehaviorRegistry or known non-PLAY_CARD domain route
functionalUnits.faqRefs: candidate page refs from PDF/FAQ card-name mentions; must be manually adjudicated before tests
functionalUnits.dependsOnP0RuleDomains: rule domains that must be complete before full-official coverage can be claimed
functionalUnits.riskScore: heuristic prioritization score used only for Stage 2 triage

stage3A.smokeRoles: Stage 3A smoke/card-shell roles only; not full-official card effect coverage.
stage3A.payCostRuntimeRole: PAY_COST minimal runtime evidence roles, especially typed SPEND_POWER and RECYCLE_RUNE payment-resource options.
stage3A.evidencePriority: P0 = required evidence boundary for 3A smoke/PAY_COST sign-off; P1 = useful supporting/display-only evidence; P2 = hold back from 3A.
stage3A.riskTags: 3A-specific triage tags layered over Stage 2 riskScore and P0/P1 rule-domain dependencies.

fieldDefinitions.stage3ASmokePayCost: Stage 3A overlay for smoke baseline, strongly typed complex command parsing, and PAY_COST minimal runtime slice. This explicitly excludes battle/damage/order runtime and 1009 full-official coverage.

snapshotEntries.cardName: 邪焰巨龙 卡德雷格林

stage3A.useBoundary: May appear in opening hand/card shell smoke. Do not treat Heimerdinger copied tap-skill behavior as in-scope for 3A.
May appear in opening hand/card shell smoke. Do not exercise discard alternative play or cleanup behavior in 3A.

stage3A.payCostRuntimeRole: red rune / basic rune resource domain representative for RECYCLE_RUNE payment-resource actions.
stage3A.useBoundary: Only the resource-domain payment contribution is in 3A. Do not claim all rune card entries or all resource timing windows are full-official.
May appear in opening hand/card detail smoke. Do not enter spell duel, stack resolution, or damage runtime through Hextech Ray in 3A.

functionalUnits.name: 邪焰巨龙 卡德雷格林

stage3A.payCostRuntimeRole: off-trait/basic rune resource fixture used to prove server-provided paymentResourcePowerByChoice controls UI/command validity.
stage3A.useBoundary: Use only as a payment-resource filtering fixture. Do not adjudicate full rune taxonomy or all color/trait interactions in 3A.

stage3A.payCostRuntimeRole: primary PLAY_CARD PAY_COST representative for SPEND_POWER amount choices, typed red power spend, RECYCLE_RUNE payment resources, payment envelope, and prompt stamp guarded submit.
stage3A.useBoundary: 3A may assert PAY_COST command parsing, payment resources, COST_PAID envelope, and stack damageAmount metadata only. Do not treat this as full Bullet Time damage assignment, battle lifecycle, or full-official card coverage.
Do not pull equipment/assemble or LayerEngine behavior into 3A.

stage3A.payCostRuntimeRole: enemy battlefield unit body for Bullet Time runtime smoke.
stage3A.useBoundary: Use as a target/body object in PAY_COST smoke. Do not exercise Mighty Faerie card text or movement-payment behavior in 3A.
Haste optional payment remains outside 3A unless A explicitly opens that slice.
Do not use Hostile Takeover in 3A smoke/PAY_COST runtime.

stage3ASmokePayCost.stage: Stage 3A smoke baseline and PAY_COST minimal runtime overlay
scope: official opening / desktop-shell smoke card visibility
strongly typed PLAY_CARD optionalCosts parsing for SPEND_POWER and RECYCLE_RUNE payment resources
PAY_COST minimal runtime payment envelope and resource debit evidence
explicitlyOutOfScope: control-change gameplay beyond existing targeted slices
stage3ASmokePayCost.faqSourcePolicy: Use the five PDF/FAQ sources already extracted in sourceEvidence; do not use cardQaList.

nonCard3AContracts.note: Typed optionalCosts such as SPEND_POWER:red:2 and RECYCLE_RUNE:<objectId> are command/protocol evidence, not extra card coverage.
Prompt stamp acceptance/rejection supports 3A command correctness but maps to no functional unit.
Card visibility/detail evidence must not be upgraded to implemented full text.
